lessons.title: Problem decomposition
lessons.script: Today's skill: Problem decomposition. Here's what interviewers look for. clarify constraints before coding. break ambiguous problems into subproblems. name edge cases explicitly Practice this on the tree, then run a mock or drill on arrays and strings and trees problems. Reflect: where did you last use this in real work?

lessons.title: Arrays & two pointers
lessons.script: Today's skill: Arrays & two pointers. Here's what interviewers look for. invariants for sliding windows. trade memory for time deliberately. state complexity before optimizing Practice this on the tree, then run a mock or drill on arrays problems. Reflect: where did you last use this in real work?

lessons.title: Trees & graphs
lessons.script: Today's skill: Trees & graphs. Here's what interviewers look for. pick traversal for the question. handle null and empty base cases. recursive vs iterative trade-offs Practice this on the tree, then run a mock or drill on trees problems. Reflect: where did you last use this in real work?

lessons.title: Strings & parsing
lessons.script: Today's skill: Strings & parsing. Here's what interviewers look for. character-level vs substring reasoning. hash maps for frequency and grouping. watch off-by-one on indices Practice this on the tree, then run a mock or drill on strings problems. Reflect: where did you last use this in real work?

lessons.title: Debugging under pressure
lessons.script: Today's skill: Debugging under pressure. Here's what interviewers look for. reproduce before fixing. isolate failure scope. explain root cause not symptom Practice this on the tree, then run a mock or drill on debugging problems. Reflect: where did you last use this in real work?

lessons.script: Today's skill: System design. Here's what interviewers look for. capacity and latency estimates. bottleneck identification. consistency vs availability trade-offs Practice this on the tree, then run a mock or drill on system-design problems. Reflect: where did you last use this in real work?

lessons.title: AI-assisted delivery
lessons.script: Today's skill: AI-assisted delivery. Here's what interviewers look for. verify AI output instead of trusting it. explain decisions AI did not make for you. recover when AI output is wrong Practice this on the tree, then run a mock or drill on debugging and system-design problems. lessons.script: Today's skill: RAG & retrieval. Reflect: where did you last use this in real work?

lessons.title: Prompting & few-shot
lessons.script: Today's skill: Prompting & few-shot. Here's what interviewers look for. system vs user message roles. when few-shot helps vs hurts. eval prompts like you eval models Practice this on the tree, then run a mock or drill on prompting problems. Reflect: where did you last use this in real work?

lessons.title: Agents & orchestration
lessons.script: Today's skill: Agents & orchestration. Here's what interviewers look for. tool use vs prompt-only. state and failure recovery. cost and latency budgets Practice this on the tree, then run a mock or drill on agents problems. Reflect: where did you last use this in real work?

lessons.title: Eval discipline
lessons.script: Today's skill: Eval discipline. Here's what interviewers look for. define ground truth before scoring. offline vs online metrics. regression when model changes Practice this on the tree, then run a mock or drill on evals problems. Reflect: where did you last use this in real work?

lessons.script: Today's skill: ML from first principles. Here's what interviewers look for. implement core blocks without hiding libraries. debug training failures (loss spikes). explain what the model is learning Practice this on the tree, then run a mock or drill on ai-system-design and evals problems. Reflect: where did you last use this in real work?

Here's what interviewers look for. correct efficient Python for research. pandas/numpy fluency. simulation to sanity-check math Practice this on the tree, then run a mock or drill on arrays and strings and debugging problems. Reflect: where did you last use this in real work?

lessons.script: Today's skill: Research hygiene. Here's what interviewers look for. look-ahead bias and data leakage. train/test split honesty. multiple-testing and overfitting Practice this on the tree, then run a mock or drill on evals problems. Reflect: where did you last use this in real work?

lessons.script: Today's skill: Adversarial reasoning. Here's what interviewers look for. defend sample size and methodology. answer follow-ups on failure modes. intellectual humility under pushback Practice this on the tree, then run a mock or drill on evals and debugging problems. Reflect: where did you last use this in real work?

lessons.script: Today's skill: Signal to production. Here's what interviewers look for. backtest vs live gap. transaction costs and capacity. n to N scaling argument Practice this on the tree, then run a mock or drill on ai-system-design problems. Reflect: where did you last use this in real work?

lessons.script: Today's skill: Threat modeling. Here's what interviewers look for. name assets and trust boundaries first. prioritize threats by likelihood and impact. tie controls to specific failure modes Practice this on the tree, then run a mock or drill on threat-modeling problems. lessons.script: Today's skill: Web vulnerabilities. Here's what interviewers look for. root cause over symptom patching. output encoding and parameterized queries. secure defaults in frameworks Practice this on the tree, then run a mock or drill on web-security problems. Reflect: where did you last use this in real work?

lessons.script: Today's skill: Auth & identity. Here's what interviewers look for. OAuth/OIDC flows and failure modes. session binding and token storage. least privilege for humans and services Practice this on the tree, then run a mock or drill on auth-identity problems. lessons.script: Today's skill: Secure by design. Here's what interviewers look for. zero trust over perimeter-only models. blast-radius limits between environments. pragmatic rollout without blocking shipping Practice this on the tree, then run a mock or drill on secure-design problems. Reflect: where did you last use this in real work?

lessons.title: Cryptography in practice
lessons.script: Today's skill: Cryptography in practice. Here's what interviewers look for. what each control actually protects. key lifecycle and access boundaries. TLS and secrets hygiene in production Practice this on the tree, then run a mock or drill on crypto problems. Reflect: where did you last use this in real work?

lessons.script: Today's skill: Incident response. Here's what interviewers look for. contain without destroying evidence. scope lateral movement and credential exposure. communicate with legal and leadership early Practice this on the tree, then run a mock or drill on incident-response problems. lessons.script: Today's skill: Martech architecture. Here's what interviewers look for. CDP as source of truth, tools as consumers. identity resolution across systems. consent and data quality at ingestion Practice this on the tree, then run a mock or drill on martech-integrations problems. lessons.script: Today's skill: GTM strategy. Here's what interviewers look for. sequence channels by learning speed. position against the alternative, not competitors. instrument the launch before shipping it Practice this on the tree, then run a mock or drill on gtm-strategy problems. lessons.script: Today's skill: Research hygiene. Here's what interviewers look for. look-ahead bias and data leakage in scientific ML. pre-registration vs exploratory analysis honesty. when a benchmark does not transfer to deployment Practice this on the tree, then run a mock or drill on scientific-methods and evals problems. lessons.script: Today's skill: Experiment design.
